properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v2 v4 v5 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You moved the mountains Told the wind and waves, "Be still" You cast out demons And bid the empty soul, "Be filled"

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now there's breakthrough Now there's freedom in Your name You gave us power And the keys to do the same

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You hold redemption Made accusers drop their stones You showed us mercy With Your mighty miracles

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now we proclaim In Jesus' name Walls fall down In Jesus' name Strongholds break In Jesus' name, amen

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We are healed In Jesus' name There are miracles In Jesus' name Pour them out In Jesus' name, amen

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You crushed the darkness And made a fool of death and grave Oh, King Jesus (Listen) You make royals out of slaves

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /;Oh, oh, oh, oh God, we echo Your authority:/
